content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.vtuber_tts
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/vtuber_tts.py (351 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: VTuber TTS - Streamlined voice synthesis for Cosmos VTuber streaming.

Single voice (Cosmos), F5-TTS voice cloning (primary) with XTTS v2 and Edge TTS fallbacks.
Pre-loads model at startup for zero-latency first generation.

Priority: F5-TTS (fast, high quality) → XTTS v2 → Edge TTS (no cloning)

CLASSES:
- VTuberTTS: Streamlined TTS for VTuber streaming - Cosmos voice only.

Priority chain:
1. F5
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, text: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_audio_duration(self, audio_path: str) -> float
  Methods: async def cleanup(self)
